title: Tameable Foxes
description: Taming foxes was never easier than that!
body:
# 🦊
Tameable Foxes ![CuteFoxBanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c1247e88641f315bba2b54326244b7e72781290_0.webp) Please read the changelogs, as they can be really important for you if you upgrade the mod from previous versions. #
### ✨ So, you wonder how to get a cute fox? - Tame them using glow berries (Item can be changed in the config) **or** - You can breed them with sweet berries and the baby will trust you if the config is enabled. (True by Default) ## ⚙️ Mod Compatibility: Yes, Tameable Foxes integrates with a few mods, here is the ones we know it works with: - [Companion 🐕](https://modrinth.com/mod/companion) - Foxes now can travel through portals, won't attack with you anymore if their health is below 20%, and they will also teleport to you if a chunk is about to be unloaded so you never lose your foxes! - [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) - The pat animation when you press shift near your pets now works on Foxes too! - [Friendly Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/friendly-fire) - While there is no built-in compat with this mod, it works perfectly fine with Tameable Foxes! - [Calm down, dog!](https://modrinth.com/mod/calm-down-dog) - While there is also no built-in compat with this mod, now you can calm your foxes by patting them so they stop biting your favorite friend! - [Ecologics](https://modrinth.com/mod/ecologics) - Tamed foxes from now don't attack the squirrels. Squirrels are also not feared of tamed foxes anymore (since 2.0.4) - ~~[Vulpine](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulpine)~~ - Unfortunately, you will have to choose between them. Tameable Foxes is entirely incompatible with Vulpine. ---
❓ Frequently Asked Questions - **Q: Does it work with [insert mod]?** - **A:** It can only be figured out by testing, feel free to open an issue if you find an incompatibility! # - **Q: What changes does this mod make to foxes?** - **A:** Now foxes helps you in combat, sit, teleport to you, follow you for their favorite food, not hunt for chickens and rabbits when tamed, alongside a config to adjust foxes to your likings! # - **Q: I found a bug or an incompatibility with this mod!** - **A:** Open an issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/Lancet-crow/tameable-foxes/issues/new), please. I'll try to help you if it's possible to fix it. # - **Q: Where can I ask a question about the mod or join the community?** - **A:** For this exact purpose you can use our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/RQ9cCyMr5Z)!
## 💜 Credits: This mod was inspired by 2 mods which being [Vulpine](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulpine) by **TalonFloof** and [Fox Pet](https://modrinth.com/mod/foxpet) by **Hyrlost**! Special Thanks to [Fyoncle](https://modrinth.com/user/Fyoncle) for helping with logo, markdown, and testing of all the bugs. And big thanks to [queenofthebees](https://modrinth.com/user/queenofthebees) for developing the [Bee Buddies](https://modrinth.com/mod/beebuddy) mod which basically made version 2.0.0 possible with it's ASM code. ~~*And rest in peace to every fox that got hurt in the development of this mod.*~~
